overview.description: The MRBL Enhanced Equity ETF (EDGE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds, seeking capital appreciation through investments in US large-cap companies. The strategy combines leveraged equity exposure with an income-enhancing options strategy. EDGE was launched on Jan 21, 2025 and is issued by MRBL.
